_comment: Swap any sprite by changing 'src' to a new path. Sizes are in authored-resolution pixels (1280x720). SpriteManager auto-scales them to the actual canvas size.
_levels_comment: Per-level sprite overrides are declared in src/core/LevelConfig.js and applied by LevelManager via SpriteManager.swapSprite at the midpoint of each cross-fade. The convention is: drop a PNG at assets/sprites/levels/levelN/<key>.png (e.g. assets/sprites/levels/level3/asteroid.png) and it will load when level N becomes active. Missing files keep the previous level's sprite (or the procedural fallback if none has ever loaded).
_planets_comment: Each LEVELS[i] in src/core/LevelConfig.js declares a `planetSprites` array of six sprite keys — one per planet slot — and a `planetPalette` of six colours. The matching colour is applied as a TINT to the sprite via the SpriteManager's multiply-blend pass, so a single black/white planet PNG can be reused across slots and levels and the gradient cross-fade automatically recolours it. Missing PNGs fall back to the procedural radial-gradient body, so none of these files are required for the game to run.

planet_green._comment: Tinted at runtime with the matching planetPalette colour. Black/white sprites recommended; transparent background required.

star_collectible._comment: Collectible star entity. Replace 'src' with any 20x20 (or larger square) PNG to customise the look. The image is rotated automatically; transparent background recommended.

asteroid._comment: Falling asteroid entity. Replace 'src' with any ~50x50 PNG to customise the look. Transparent background recommended; the image is rotated (tumbles) as it falls.

black_hole._comment: Short-lived gravity-well hazard (level 2+). Drawn at ~1.6 x BLACK_HOLE_PULL_RADIUS (220x220 by default). The opaque black kill core is ALWAYS painted on top, so the lethal centre is visible even with a custom sprite. Replace 'src' to customise the swirl artwork.

cake._comment: Player-sized pickup hazard (level 3+). Touching one applies the 'fat & slow' debuff for CAKE_SLOW_DURATION seconds. Replace 'src' to customise the dessert artwork.

bomb._comment: Proximity-mine hazard (level 4+). Drawn at 2 x BOMB_BODY_RADIUS (28x28 by default). Replace 'src' to customise the bomb artwork; the explosion flash is always procedural.

boss._comment: Final-level boss sprite. Drawn at 5x player radius (180x180 by default). Drop a PNG at assets/sprites/levels/level6/boss.png to override; missing files leave the procedural fallback in place.

ui_intro._comment: Full-screen intro splash shown after the player clicks 'Start game' from the menu. 1280x720 authored resolution.

ui_outro._comment: Full-screen outro splash shown after all levels are cleared. 1280x720 authored resolution.
